commands: psql -h datastack-staging-databaseb269d8bb-quozjnaozdbv.cz2ac6quymbd.us-east-2.rds.amazonaws.com -U postgres -d bhcaptureco -c "SELECT table_name, column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name IN ('Purchase','PurchaseItem','DownloadEntitlement') ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;"
psql -h datastack-staging-databaseb269d8bb-quozjnaozdbv.cz2ac6quymbd.us-east-2.rds.amazonaws.com -U postgres -d bhcaptureco -c "SELECT COUNT(*) AS entitlement_count FROM \"DownloadEntitlement\";"

psql -h datastack-staging-databaseb269d8bb-quozjnaozdbv.cz2ac6quymbd.us-east-2.rds.amazonaws.com -U postgres -d bhcaptureco -c "SELECT * FROM \"DownloadEntitlement\" ORDER BY \"createdAt\" DESC LIMIT 20;"
